name: batch-aggregation
title: Transaction Queue with WAL Persistence and Configurable Batch Aggregation for Enterprise Validium Node
hypothesis: A persistent transaction queue with write-ahead logging and configurable batch aggregation (size-based, time-based, hybrid) can sustain 100+ tx/min throughput with batch formation latency under 5 seconds, guarantee zero transaction loss under crash recovery, and produce deterministic batches (identical transaction sets yield identical batch outputs).
null_hypothesis: Either throughput degrades below 100 tx/min under sustained load, batch formation latency exceeds 5 seconds, crash recovery loses transactions, or batch formation is non-deterministic.
